mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jsh_customer_statement (statement_no, organ_id, begin_time, end_time, total_weight, total_amount, status, sign_status, attachment, remark, delete_flag, create_time, creator) VALUES (#{statementNo}, #{organId}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{totalWeight}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{signStatus}, #{attachment}, #{remark}, #{deleteFlag}, #{createTime}, #{creator})
mapper.select: SELECT id, statement_no as statementNo, organ_id as organId, begin_time as beginTime, end_time as endTime, total_weight as totalWeight, total_amount as totalAmount, ifnull(received_amount,0) as receivedAmount, status, sign_status as signStatus, attachment, remark, tenant_id as tenantId, delete_flag as deleteFlag, create_time as createTime, creator FROM jsh_customer_statement WHERE id=#{id} AND ifnull(delete_flag,'0') != '1'
SELECT count(1) FROM jsh_customer_statement WHERE statement_no LIKE concat('DZ', #{datePrefix}, '%') AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT pai.id, pai.approval_id as approvalId, dh.id as depotHeadId, dh.organ_id as organId, dh.number as billNo, dh.oper_time as billTime, dh.remark as billRemark, mc.name as categoryName, m.name as brand, m.model, m.standard, m.weight as unitWeight, pai.oper_number as operNumber, pai.weight as itemWeight, pai.unit_price as unitPrice, pai.all_price as allPrice, s.supplier as customerName FROM jsh_customer_statement_item csi JOIN jsh_price_approval_item pai ON pai.id = csi.depot_item_id AND ifnull(pai.delete_flag,'0') != '1' JOIN jsh_price_approval pa ON pa.id = pai.approval_id AND ifnull(pa.delete_flag,'0') != '1' JOIN jsh_depot_item di ON di.id = pai.depot_item_id AND ifnull(di.delete_flag,'0') != '1' JOIN jsh_depot_head dh ON dh.id = di.header_id AND ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0') != '1' JOIN jsh_material m ON m.id = pai.material_id LEFT JOIN jsh_material_category mc ON mc.id = m.category_id LEFT JOIN jsh_supplier s ON s.id = dh.organ_id WHERE csi.statement_id = #{statementId} AND ifnull(csi.delete_flag,'0') != '1' ORDER BY dh.oper_time, pai.id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jsh_customer_statement_item (statement_id, depot_item_id, delete_flag) VALUES
(#{statementId}, #{itemId}, '0')
